subject: Nina
body:
Hello Jeffrey! 
how are you?
I've arrived,thank you so much for the apartment!!

I think i will need one-two days to get in form after the flight and jet lag (a bit tired,don't feel that well,going to massage,manicure today,etc.,and going to get to sleep earlier in the evening), but since tomorrow/day after tomorrow- i'll be fine,and if you're not very busy and you're in nyc,i hope very much that we can see each other..   and i have sth. from russia for you :)
Sarah knowes my number,i guess,but just in case my number here is 917-3472103269
xoxo
Nina
